summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ollama model switching and routing feature. All backend APIs work correctly, Models page loads and functions properly, model badges display on messages, and all existing features remain functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/models returns complete config with routing table for all 8 agents
POST /api/models/config successfully updates and persists configuration
GET /api/models/test/{model_name} correctly handles Ollama offline state
GET /api/health includes routing_mode, reasoning_model, coding_model fields
POST /api/models/pull correctly rejects when Ollama offline (503 status)
POST /api/chat returns model_info with model, mode, and routing fields
Messages include model_used and model_mode fields
Models page loads with all components: Ollama endpoint, routing mode buttons, model inputs
Routing table displays all 8 agents with correct model assignments per task type
Available Models tab shows pull input functionality
Per-Agent Overrides tab shows override inputs for all agents
Save Config button works and persists changes
Model badges (SIM - yellow) display correctly on Boardroom messages
Model badges display correctly on Dialogue messages
Sidebar shows Models nav item and navigates correctly
All existing features work: Dashboard, Boardroom, Dialogue, Delegation, Approvals, Projects, Budget
All navigation items present and functional

success_percentage.backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed including 6 new model routing tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (Models page fully functional, model badges working, all existing features working)
